dsl_rule.translation_notes: Broadening Bottom breakout entry: price closes above the highest high in formation (approximated using Donchian upper band for the highest high over recent bars). Exit uses mean reversion to Donchian middle as a reasonable exit when momentum fades. Entry filter to avoid dead-cat bounce would require pattern detection not available in indicator set. Success rates (62% bull, 34% bear) and average rise (27%) noted but not encoded as they are statistical outcomes. Default stop loss set to 5% and max hold to 30 days based on pattern characteristics.

source_rule_text: Broadening Bottom: A breakout occurs when prices rise above the highest high in the formation
